description_long: This is a rustic wooden cabin with a weathered, shingle-style gable roof and a stone chimney protruding from one side. The exterior walls are constructed from horizontal wooden planks, some of which are overgrown with climbing vegetation, giving the structure an aged and natural appearance. The cabin features several rectangular windows with wooden shutters, some of which are closed, and a single solid wooden door with a metal handle. The base of the cabin is finished with a concrete or stone foundation, adding to its sturdy look. The roof is covered in overlapping brown shingles, and the overall structure is compact, with no visible porch or veranda. The cabin's design and materials suggest it is intended for residential use in a rural or semi-urban setting.
description: A rustic wooden cabin with a shingle gable roof, stone chimney, shuttered windows, and a solid wooden door, set on a stone foundation and partially covered in climbing plants.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance door, a window with open shutters, the stone chimney, and visible climbing plants on the wall.
description_view_1: Rear corner view highlighting the gable roof, wooden plank siding, and vegetation climbing up the back wall, with no visible doors or windows.
description_view_2: Side view displaying two windows with shutters, extensive climbing plants, and the full length of the shingle roof and stone foundation.
description_view_3: Opposite front view showing two shuttered windows, the gable roof, and the stone chimney, with more visible vegetation at the base.
attribute_roof_type: gable roof with overlapping wooden shingles and a stone chimney
attribute_window_arrangement: Three rectangular windows with wooden shutters, asymmetrically distributed on the visible facades, with one window on the front and two on the side, all of similar size
attribute_door_placement: Single solid wooden door located on the front facade, offset to the right side
